::: {style="font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Source Serif Pro';"}


<i><span class=kog-epigraph-verse>$^{20}$</span><span style="color: black;">And when he was demanded of the Pharisees, when the kingdom of God should
come, he answered them and said, </span><span style="color: red;">The kingdom of
God cometh not with observation. <span class=kog-epigraph-verse>$^{21}$</span><span style="color: red;">Neither shall they say, "Lo
here!" or, "Lo there!" for, behold, the kingdom of God is within you.</span></i>

[Luke 17, King James Version](https://biblehub.com/kjv/luke/17.htm)

:::
